title: rubus rivuli
intro: Rubus rivuli, also known as the Dropping Rampion or Water Raspberry, is a perennial plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus rivuli include its potential to help reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus rivuli can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
